name: ExtensionCodeSystem_Filter_Operator
title: R5: = | is-a | descendent-of | is-not-a | regex | in | not-in | generalizes | child-of | descendent-leaf | exists
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `CodeSystem.filter.operator` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`CodeSystem.filter.operator` 1..* `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `CodeSystem.filter.operator` 1..* `code`
*  R4B: `CodeSystem.filter.operator` 1..* `code`
*  R4: `CodeSystem.filter.operator` 1..* `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `CodeSystem.filter.operator` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `CodeSystem.filter.operator` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.short: R5: = | is-a | descendent-of | is-not-a | regex | in | not-in | generalizes | child-of | descendent-leaf | exists
element.comment: Element `CodeSystem.filter.operator` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `CodeSystem.filter.operator` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.short: = | is-a | descendent-of | is-not-a | regex | in | not-in | generalizes | child-of | descendent-leaf | exists
element.definition: A list of operators that can be used with the filter.

binding.description: The kind of operation to perform as a part of a property based filter.
